description: Plugin-distributed hooks for legal-ops-clm. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable legal-ops anti-patterns (a contract/legal-ops deliverable with no 'not legal advice' boundary; a clause library with a standard but no fallback/walk-away; a renewal/auto-renew tracker with an expiry but no notice-window/notice deadline). Set CLM_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
